content: Spaghetti marinara is a classic Italian pasta dish made with tomato sauce, garlic, basil, and olive oil.
Bruschetta is grilled bread rubbed with garlic and topped with tomato, basil, olive oil, and salt.
Neapolitan pizza traditionally uses tomato sauce made from San Marzano tomatoes.
Minestrone is an Italian vegetable soup that can include tomato broth and pasta.
Tiramisu is an Italian dessert made with mascarpone, coffee-soaked ladyfingers, and cocoa.
